blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit prevents plan generation - all plan-dependent assertions are blocked

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 9 blocked. All assertions blocked by OpenRouter rate limit (20 req/min, 50 req/day). The free tier prevents plan generation which is a prerequisite for testing all plan display and persistence features. Previous testing indicated plan auto-save was NOT WORKING - this validation confirms rate limits prevent verifying any fixes.
